category_sources: source_facts.description describes deploying Terraform applications directly to LocalStack.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is terraform-local; official GitHub README brands the command as tflocal for Terraform with LocalStack.
docs_sources: Official LocalStack docs have a Terraform integration page covering tflocal; official GitHub README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository localstack/terraform-local describes the Terraform CLI wrapper for LocalStack; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies Terraform and LocalStack context; official README describes the tflocal CLI wrapper.
